title: exostema myrtifolium subsp. barbatum
intro: Exostema myrtifolium subsp. barbatum, also known as barbatum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Exostema myrtifolium subsp. barbatum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a variety of ways.
